chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-215 of 2024 Constitutional Petition No.S-216 of 2024 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 12-09-2025 Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General. -------- Petitioners and respondents are present in person. Mr. Feroz Gul Khoso filed power on behalf of the petitioners in both the petitions and submits that parties have patched up outsides the court which has also been confirmed by Mst. Kiran respondent in CP No.216/2024 and Mst. Erum respondent in CP No.215/2024, he therefore does not press the instant petitions, which are dismissed as not press. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
